# HTML Passthrough

This document contains raw HTML blocks that should pass through verbatim.

<div class="note">
  <p>This is an HTML block.</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Item one</li>
    <li>Item two</li>
  </ul>
</div>

## Section with Inline HTML

Text with <strong>inline HTML</strong> and <em>emphasis</em>.

<table>
<tr><th>Col1</th><th>Col2</th></tr>
<tr><td>A</td><td>B</td></tr>
</table>

Regular paragraph after HTML.
